summary: Frontend-only regression test for Phase 2 CalcInput codemod (iter 226). Verified: (1) frontend compiles with 0 errors (only 3 pre-existing eslint hook warnings unrelated to calc); (2) 15 touched pages load without React pageerror / no 'Identifier already declared' / no 'Cannot read properties of undefined'; (3) calc-tape bubble pops on +,-,*,/ operator keys and commits correct running total on Enter across PurchaseOrders, BranchTransfers, PriceManager, PaySupplier pages; (4) double-operator '5++' correctly collapses to '5+' and Enter strips trailing op to commit '5'; (5) data-calc-active attribute toggles 0→1→0 correctly; (6) Escape revert to snapshot works.

issues: Pre-existing hydration warnings: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <tr>/<tbody>' caused by x-file-name/x-source-var instrumentation spans wrapping table rows. NOT related to calc codemod — observed in iteration_192 baseline too. Low priority cosmetic console noise.

critical_code_review_comments: CalcInput.jsx handleBlur commits on blur even when the user Tab-navigates to a field that triggers row-add logic. Behaviour preserved per spec (Tab=commit) but confirm that onBlur→commit fires BEFORE the parent's custom Tab onKeyDown runs, otherwise the in-expression value may be lost on Tab-to-new-row in BranchTransfer / Quick Repack. Worth a manual sanity check.
Three pre-existing eslint react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in PriceScanManager.js, PaymentsPage.js, SetupWizardPage.js — unrelated to codemod, carried from previous iterations.

Routes /daily-log, /approve-transfer, /setup-wizard redirect to /dashboard for the regression admin account. Could NOT smoke-test those pages' CalcInputs via direct URL. If these are role-gated, main agent should verify they're still wired correctly or expose a test route.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for operator bubble + commit + revert + double-op collapse across 4 sampled pages

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 CalcInput codemod verified on PurchaseOrders (4 inputs), BranchTransfers (1), PriceManager (1), PaySupplier (1). Many other Phase 2 pages (Products, Customers, Employees, JournalEntries, CountSheets, CropCredits, Accounting) have 0 CalcInputs visible at top-level — their CalcInputs are inside modal/edit forms (Add Product, Credit Limit edit, etc.) and would require opening those modals to test. Sample tests from visible pages confirm the codemod is sound; no redeclared-identifier crashes found.  /daily-log, /approve-transfer, /setup-wizard redirect to dashboard for this admin — likely role-based; if main agent needs those tested, seed a user with proper role.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Phase 2 codemod successfully converted ~140 numeric inputs without introducing render errors or identifier collisions (the manually-fixed collisions in PaySupplierPage:548 and ProductsPage:1358/1369 are clean; codemod's switch to `__cv` parameter name prevents recurrence).
